candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate revenue total that matches Revenue across years; useful as fallback label across periods.
Not revenue; bottom-line comprehensive income.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability/deferred revenue related, not reported top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported revenue line and the duplicate total as fallback priority labels; later code should take the first non-missing value.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is reported. Rows such as External Expenses appear broad operating expenses rather than direct COGS, so leave unmapped.

candidates.why: Broad operating expense bucket, but likely includes more than SG&A and may include non-SG&A items; not preferred if explicit SG&A exists.
Explicit SG&A row; best semantic match.
Operating overhead/personnel cost; good component especially for years where SG&A row is blank.
Headcount metric, not an expense line.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A exists but is blank in earlier years, so included it plus Staff costs to improve coverage for earlier years per rule. Excluded External Expenses because it is too broad and may capture non-SG&A costs.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement.

candidates.why: Total finance cost line, but underlying recurring components are available so less preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component; appropriate for XINT.
Direct interest expense component; appropriate for XINT.
Residual finance bucket may include non-interest items; avoid if clearer components exist.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting against primary line.
Equity line, not finance cost.
Equity line, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest expense components and excluded the total Financial Expenses row to avoid double counting. Excluded residual finance bucket because it may contain non-interest items.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Owner/parent equity line that excludes minority interest; best match for book equity.
Non-controlling interest, should map to MIB not BE.
Includes minority interest, so less preferred when owner equity exists.
Shareholder count, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected parent/owner equity to avoid double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best semantic match.
Direct balance sheet minority interest line; also valid and appears identical.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Provided both balance sheet minority-interest labels as priority alternatives since they appear to be duplicate formulations across years; later code should take the first non-missing value.
